text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems like Winning Ticket is worried about
something.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Hmmmm... I don't get it... Why do I feel so under
the weather?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I'm eating well, I sleep like a log...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
N-no, I can't be like this! All this thinking is
making my brain hurt!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Looks like she's a little exhausted. Maybe I need
to revise her race schedule.
